'''vazata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ngangkari|ngangkari]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-z-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ngangkari|ngangkari]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vazata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:væzætæth|væzætæth]] || [[word:væzætæj|væzætæj]] || [[word:væzætæsh|væzætæsh]] || [[word:væzætæ|væzætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vazazatath|vazazatath]] || [[word:vazazataj|vazazataj]] || [[word:vazazatash|vazazatash]] || [[word:vazazata|vazazata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vazatath|vazatath]] || [[word:vazataj|vazataj]] || [[word:vazatash|vazatash]] || [[word:vazata|vazata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vazaftath|vazaftath]] || [[word:vazaftaj|vazaftaj]] || [[word:vazaftash|vazaftash]] || [[word:vazaftaf|vazaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vazatatha|vazatatha]] || [[word:vazataja|vazataja]] || [[word:vazatasha|vazatasha]] || [[word:vazataka|vazataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vazatath|vazatath]] || [[word:vazataj|vazataj]] || [[word:vazatash|vazatash]] || [[word:vazata|vazata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vazatathal|vazatathal]] || [[word:vazatajal|vazatajal]] || [[word:vazatashal|vazatashal]] || [[word:vazatakal|vazatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vazatathatha|vazatathatha]] || [[word:vazatajaja|vazatajaja]] || [[word:vazatashasha|vazatashasha]] || [[word:vazataka|vazataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vazatathan|vazatathan]] || [[word:vazatajan|vazatajan]] || [[word:vazatashan|vazatashan]] || [[word:vazatakan|vazatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vazatathaoro|vazatathaoro]] || [[word:vazatajaoro|vazatajaoro]] || [[word:vazatashaoro|vazatashaoro]] || [[word:vazatakaoro|vazatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
